tasks.label: Boot iOS Simulator
tasks.command: if xcrun simctl list devices booted | grep -q 'iPhone 16 Pro'; then echo 'iPhone 16 Pro already running'; else open -a Simulator && sleep 2 && xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 16 Pro' 2>/dev/null && echo 'Booting iPhone 16 Pro...' || echo 'Simulator booting...'; sleep 3; fi

tasks.label: Boot Android Emulator
tasks.command: if adb devices | grep -q 'emulator.*device'; then echo '✓ Android emulator is running'; else echo '✗ Android emulator not running. Start it with:' && echo '  emulator -avd Medium_Phone_API_35 &' && echo '' && echo 'Waiting for emulator...' && for i in $(seq 1 60); do adb devices | grep -q 'emulator.*device' && echo '✓ Emulator connected!' && exit 0; sleep 2; done; echo '✗ Timeout: Please start the emulator manually'; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: Run Integration Tests (Android)
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder}/example && flutter test integration_test/app_e2e_test.dart -d $(adb devices | grep emulator | head -1 | awk '{print $1}')
